description: Binance Academy hosts a webinar discussing decentralized finance (DeFi), focusing on Pull Together, yield farming, and tokenizing Bitcoin on Ethereum. The session includes a Q&A segment for audience interaction.
topic_summary: The webinar covers three main topics: an introduction to Pull Together, a savings game on Ethereum [t=96.7], yield farming [t=106.8], and tokenizing Bitcoin on Ethereum [t=106.8]. It emphasizes the educational aspect of DeFi and encourages audience participation [t=115.4].
